title: Aquamira Grn Line Series 3 Frontier Replacement Charcoal Filter Water, OEM

Aquamira Grn Line Series 3 Frontier Replacement Filter Water Treatment 50 Gallon

The Aquamira Frontier replacement filter features a new and improved design that will remove bacteria, cryptosporidium, and giardia from water, making this a must-have camping or hiking survival tool. The Miraguard technology in this filter will suppress the growth of bacteria, algae, fungus, mold, and mildew within the filter media so that you can count on it to provide you with clean drinking water.

Key Features

  • GRN LINE BACTERIA FILTER – The Aquamira Frontier replacement filter features the new and improved design that will remove bacteria, cryptosporidium and giardia from water, making this a must-have camping or hiking survival tool.
  • MIRAGUARD ANTIMICROBIAL TECHNOLOGY – The Miraguard technology in this filter will suppress the growth of bacteria, algae, fungus, mold and mildew within the filter media so that you can count on it to provide you with clean drinking water.
  • FILTERS 50 GALLONS – The Series III replacement filter will filter up to 50 gallons of water. It is BPA, chemical and iodine free and proudly manufactured in the USA.
  • EASY CONNECTIVITY – This filter easily connects to bottles, bags, bladders and gravity systems via UQC quick connects, making this a highly cost-effective extra capacity capability.
  • ULTRALIGHT AND COMPACT – Weighing just 2.5 ounces (71 grams), this filter can easily fit into any backpack, camping bag or bug out bag without adding much weight, making it ideal for backpackers, campers and outdoor adventurers.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: A2GRNLWF3
  • UPC: 877267779570
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 50 gal

The Series III replacement filter will filter up to 50 gallons of water. It is BPA, chemical and iodine free, and proudly manufactured in the USA. This filter easily connects to bottles, bags, bladders, and gravity systems via UQC quick connects, making this a highly cost-effective extra capacity capability. Weighing just 2.5 ounces (71 grams), this filter can easily fit into any backpack, camping bag, or bug out bag without adding much weight, making it ideal for backpackers, campers, and outdoor adventurers.
